data.name: Dux Solaris
data.detailed_description:
In this universe, planets (and other cosmic entities) are not mere celestial bodies in the universe; they possess conscious anthropomorphic avatars with feelings, dreams, and clearly defined personalities. These avatars, known as STELLAE, interact with each other and have cooperated since the very moment of creation. They possess a wide range of powers and characteristics, sometimes incomprehensible to mortal minds.



Help Dux save our solar system and learn more about the STELLAE in this adventure with elements of "BULLET HELL" laden with eroticism. Throughout the game, you can acquire abilities after each boss battle and use them in your next encounter!

data.short_description: Help Dux save our solar system and learn more about the STELLAE in this adventure with elements of "BULLET HELL" laden with eroticism nd learn more about the STELLAE, discover why planets are not just rocks, and why their beauty is legendary!
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: WIN7 SP1/WIN8/WIN10/XP/WIN11
  • 處理器: 1.2
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: WIN7 SP1/WIN8/WIN10/XP/WIN11
  • 處理器: 3.3
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • 儲存空間: 10 GB 可用空間
